response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. He demonstrates strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot ability, and cloud/container experience with AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure and a short current career gap, but the overall profile aligns very well with the role.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent development, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary
Current career gap since October 2025 may warrant clarification
